cancel(uint256).details: FIX-7: Cancellation is only permitted while the proposal is Pending             (before voting has started).  Prevents a proposer from             canceling mid-vote to manipulate outcomes.      FIX-6: CEI — state is updated before emitting the event.

params.proposalId: ID of the proposal to cancel.

params._proposalThresholdBps: BPS of total supply required to propose (e.g. 100 = 1 %).
params._quorumBps: Base quorum in BPS of total supply (e.g. 400 = 4 %).
params._timelock: TimelockController used as the execution layer.
params._votingDelay: Blocks between proposal creation and voting start.
params._votingPeriod: Duration in blocks of the voting window.

execute(uint256).details: FIX-3: Delegates execution to TimelockController.executeBatch(),             which enforces that minDelay has elapsed since scheduling.      FIX-6: CEI — proposal state is marked `executed = true` BEFORE the             external call to executeBatch.      FIX-8: Uses stored arrays; no way to inject modified parameters.

params.proposalId: ID of the proposal to execute.

returns.endBlock: Last block where voting is allowed.
returns.eta: UNIX timestamp when the timelock operation matures.
returns.startBlock: First block where voting is allowed.

returns.hasVotedOut: Whether the voter has cast a vote.

hashProposal(address[],uint256[],bytes[].details: Same hash function as GovernorVulnerable for portability.

returns._0: Minimum delegated vote weight required to call propose().

returns.snapshotBlock: Block at which vote weight was frozen (FIX-1).
returns.voteEnd: Last block where voting is allowed.
returns.voteStart: First block where voting is allowed.

propose(address[],uint256[],bytes[],stri.details: FIX-1: snapshotBlock = block.number is recorded so that vote weight             is frozen at this instant.      FIX-4: Caller must hold at least proposalThreshold delegated votes             (checked against the previous block to comply with             ERC5805 / getPastVotes constraints).

params.calldatas: ABI-encoded call data for each target.
params.targets: Contract addresses to call on execution.
params.values: ETH values forwarded to each call.

queue(uint256).details: FIX-3: Mandatory queuing step — schedules the operation batch in             the TimelockController, enforcing the configurable delay.      FIX-6: CEI — proposal state is marked `queued = true` BEFORE the             external call to scheduleBatch.      FIX-8: Uses stored arrays from proposal creation; no caller-supplied             arrays accepted, so tampering is impossible by design.

params.proposalId: ID of the proposal to queue.

state(uint256).details: FIX-5: quorumVotes > 0 causes Defeated for low-participation votes.      FIX-3: Queued state added between Succeeded and Executed.

TIMELOCK().notice: TimelockController that acts as the execution layer.  (FIX-3)

cancel(uint256).notice: Cancel a proposal that is still in the Pending state.

castVote(uint256,uint8).notice: Cast a vote on an active proposal.

castVoteWithReason(uint256,uint8,string).notice: Cast a vote with an optional reason string.

constructor.notice: Deploys the governor, wiring up the token and timelock.

execute(uint256).notice: Execute a queued proposal after the timelock delay has elapsed.

getProposal(uint256).notice: Returns a summary of the given proposal for off-chain consumers.

getReceipt(uint256,address).notice: Returns the vote receipt for a specific voter on a proposal.

hashProposal(address[],uint256[],bytes[].notice: Deterministically derives a proposal ID from its contents.

proposalCount().notice: Total number of proposals ever created.

proposalDescriptionHash(uint256).notice: Returns the descriptionHash stored for a proposal.

proposalProposer(uint256).notice: Returns the proposer of a given proposal.

proposalThreshold().notice: Absolute proposal-creation threshold derived from         `proposalThresholdBps` and the current total supply.

proposalThresholdBps().notice: FIX-4: basis points of total supply required to create a proposal.         e.g. 100 = 1 %.  Call proposalThreshold() for the absolute value.

proposalVotes(uint256).notice: Returns the raw vote tallies for a proposal.

proposalWindow(uint256).notice: Returns the snapshot, start and end block of a proposal's window.

queue(uint256).notice: Queue a succeeded proposal in the TimelockController.

quorumBps().notice: Base quorum in basis points of total supply.         e.g. 400 = 4 %.  Call quorumVotes() for the dynamic absolute value.

quorumVotes().notice: Dynamic quorum: absolute vote count required for a proposal to         succeed.  Adjusts based on recent participation history.         Formula (Governance_Spec §Dynamic Quorum):           dynamicBps = clamp(               avgRecentParticipationBps * 70% + 500,               MIN_QUORUM_BPS, MAX_QUORUM_BPS           )           return TOKEN.totalSupply() * dynamicBps / 10_000         Falls back to plain `quorumBps` when no history exists.

state(uint256).notice: Returns the current state of a proposal.

votingDelay().notice: Blocks to wait after proposal creation before voting starts.

votingPeriod().notice: Duration in blocks of the voting window.
